channel.title: Bash on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Bash on David's Blog

item.title: Shell Expansion
item.description: 1. Shell Expansion When the shell receives a command, either from the user typing at the keyboard, or from a shell script, it breaks it up into words. After this happens, the shell performs seven operations on the words, which can change how they are interpreted. There are seven operations are collectively known as ‘shell expansion’. The seven operations that the shell performs are: Brace Expansion - expanding values between

item.title: Bash基础之Quotes与Expansions
item.description: 1. 为什么需要Quotes 之所以需要各种quotes, 是因为Metacharacters的存在, 合适的quote可以让Metacharacte

item.title: Bash Shell Basic Syntax
item.description: 1. Bash Bash is a Unix shell and command language written by Brian Fox for the GNU Project as a free software replacement for the Bourne shell. Wikipedia A Unix shell is both a command interpreter and a programming language. As a command interpreter, the shell provides the user interface to the rich set of GNU utilities. The programming language features allow these utilities to be combined. What is a
